inferred_information.raw_ingredients: Choline (bitartraat), Magnesium (citraat), microcrystalline cellulose (vulstof), Shatavari extract (Asparagus Racemosus), Fenegriek extract (Trigonella foenum-graecum), Ijzer (bisglycinaat), Vitamine C (calciumascorbaat, magnesiumascorbaat), Zink (picolinaat), Bèta caroteen, rijstzetmeel, hpmc (glansmiddel), Vitamine K2 (Vitamk7®, menaquinon-7 K2), Selenium (methionine), Vitamine D3 (cholecalciferol, Vita-algae d®), Jodium (kaliumjodide), Zwarte peper extract (Bioperine®), Chroom (picolinaat), Foliumzuur (folaat, 5-mthf calciumzout), Vitamine B12 (methylcobalamine)
